ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of sizing standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the size (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the size */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement for the size */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement for the size */,
  "hip_min" REAL /* Minimum hip measurement for the size */,
  "hip_max" REAL /* Maximum hip measurement for the size */,
  "bust_min" REAL /* Minimum bust measurement for the size */,
  "bust_max" REAL /* Maximum bust measurement for the size */,
  "size_number" TEXT /* Size number range (e.g., 00-0, 0-2, 2-4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo image */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "brand_social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_length" REAL /* Length of the product */,
  "product_width" REAL /* Width of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this size in stock */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to the size chart for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "converted_size_name" TEXT /* Converted size name in the region */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "customer_weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurements were recorded */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_shipped_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "order_delivered_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
